name: firstlight
description: Ask Claude about the oncology research your local Firstlight app surfaced — read-only and de-identified.
long_description:
Firstlight is a free, open-source, local-first desktop app that monitors oncology research (ClinicalTrials.gov, PubMed, openFDA, Europe PMC) for one patient's case and prepares source-backed summaries for their oncology team.

This extension gives Claude read-only access to what Firstlight found — findings with match rationale and cautions, a de-identified case outline, the clinician summary, and monitoring history — through a local, consent-gated connection. Identifying details (name, date of birth, contacts, exact location, doctor or hospital names, notes) never cross the boundary: Firstlight's fail-closed de-identification layer enforces it in code.

Requires the Firstlight desktop app to be running. Turn on access and generate a connection code in Firstlight → Settings → Claude Desktop connection.

Firstlight is an information monitoring tool, not medical advice: it never determines treatment, trial eligibility, or medical appropriateness, and every finding requires clinician review.

tools.name: get_firstlight_status
tools.description: Check the local Firstlight app: version, profile presence, monitoring status, enabled sources.

tools.name: list_recent_findings
tools.description: List research findings Firstlight surfaced (trials, literature, drug updates) with rationale, cautions, and sources.

tools.name: get_finding
tools.description: Get one finding in full detail: evidence, why it surfaced, why it may not fit, known gaps.

tools.name: get_deidentified_case_context
tools.description: Get the de-identified case outline (cancer type, coarse stage, biomarkers, state-level location).

tools.name: get_latest_clinician_summary
tools.description: Get the clinician-facing summary: prioritized findings, discussion questions, data gaps.

tools.name: list_monitoring_runs
tools.description: List recent monitoring runs: when sources were checked and what was new or changed.

access_token.title: Firstlight connection code
access_token.description: Generate this in Firstlight → Settings → Claude Desktop connection, then paste it here.

port.title: Firstlight local port
port.description: Leave at 17845 unless you changed Firstlight's backend port.
